caption: Against a dark, moody background, a dynamic, fluid-like abstract sculpture of shimmering teal, green, and purple light waves swirls and evolves. The light forms complex, layered ribbons that twist and flow, creating a sense of holographic depth. Centered in the lower half of the scene, the text "THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR WATCHING" appears in a vibrant magenta, capitalized sans-serif font. As the sequence progresses, the abstract light form subtly shifts its position and shape, with the purple hues becoming more prominent and the teal ribbons curving further. The magenta text remains stationary, though it appears to pulse slightly or interact with the shifting light patterns behind it. No people or tangible physical objects are present; the entire scene is an ethereal digital animation focused on the movement of light and color.
